title: Maidrauder
body:
# Humanity spent too much time asking if they could, they never questioned if they should.

A resource pack for Origin Realms that makes the Marauder Boss a maid. I'm sorry.

How to Use: Requires ORSTASH or the Server Pack Unlocker mod like all my other packs. Follow their descriptions if you are confused on how to load the pack on the server.

## Noah. Get the Boat
